title: Strange EoE info cards of some kind
display_title: Strange EoE info cards of some kind
wikitext:
[]: Strange EoE info cards of some kind             Quote Post by LordCaldwell » Sat Dec 26, 2009 2:27 pm Someone please help! I recieved a strange package of evangelion cards of somekind. They are in Japanese, which I don't speak. On the front it shows the red earth with all of the crosses of thos. Who lost their AT fields, and the giant Rei with wings. What the hell are these? I'm sure they aren't the Eva trading card game. They are "End of Evangelion" cards. Does anyone know?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Dec 26, 2009 2:28 pm It would help if you could provide pictures.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Dec 26, 2009 3:00 pm Yeah, pics of the front and back of the cards would be helpful so it could be easily identified.

[]:             Quote Post by Ironfoot » Sat Dec 26, 2009 3:01 pm I've seen these before, years ago. They're trading cards on the Carddass Masters line and they're pretty hard to track down. They probably look similar to this , but with the EoE theme you described, which if I remember right did have GNR on the front of it in the middle of Instrumentality. The Evangelion Trading Card Game is something completely different .

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Sat Dec 26, 2009 5:56 pm MOST intriguing.

[]:             Quote Post by LordCaldwell » Sun Dec 27, 2009 7:45 pm thanks you guys. i'll try and post some scans of the package and the cards ASAP

[]:             Quote Post by LordCaldwell » Fri Jan 01, 2010 3:18 pm hey, sorry it took so long. heres a link http://sites.google.com/site/eoecards/home

[]:             Quote Post by Ironfoot » Fri Jan 01, 2010 4:18 pm Yes, these are exactly as I imagined. I haven't seen these since at least 2005, it's been a long time. Each of these cards has information about EoE on the back of them. Bochan_bird translated some of them to include in Brendan Jamieson's FAQ as supportive evidence. Many of the cards contain information found nowhere else! Here's an example... "In the sea of LCL, Shinji wished for a world with other people. He desired to meet them again, even if it meant he would be hurt and betrayed. And just as he had hoped/wanted, Asuka was present in the new world. Only Asuka was there beside him. The girl whom he had hurt, and who had been hurt by him. But even so, she was the one he had hoped/wished for...." Sadly I don't know exactly which card states that, he wasn't very specific. But in any case, it is from that pack of cards, undoubtedly. There's many other examples in that link above. What you have there should definitely be kept, it is extremely rare. Perhaps we could get some kind of translation project going on those cards someday.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jan 01, 2010 4:30 pm I mentioned which card states that one in another thread, one moment... Here we go. Copy/pasta: I in another thread wrote: Japanese text on the card is this: "In the Sea of LCL, Shinji wished for a world with other people. He desired to meet them again, even if it meant he would be hurt and betrayed. And just as he had hoped/wanted, Asuka was present in the new world. Only Asuka was there beside him. The girl whom he had hurt, and who had been hurt by him. But even so, she was the one he had hoped/wished for...."

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Jan 01, 2010 4:31 pm Did he masturbate over Asuka's unconscious body, AGAIN!?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jan 01, 2010 4:33 pm Heh, this was discussed in that actual thread, but Shinji's either holding onto Misato cross and or his hand has semen on it... Or he's holding both.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Fri Jan 01, 2010 4:36 pm Shinji...

[]:             Quote Post by Ironfoot » Fri Jan 01, 2010 4:48 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: This is Shinji's Complementation card for the game, by the way. Oh, and the Cardess thread is here.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jan 01, 2010 5:33 pm Ah, I see. Kinda confusing isn't it? Thanks for clarifying!

[]:             Quote Post by giuliano » Fri Jan 01, 2010 6:09 pm Hi, I've got a complete set of these cards, they're from the Carddass Masters 'Wide' range as opposed to just Carddass Masters and so are larger than normal trading cards for a sort of Widescreen movie look... Included in the set there are 6SP cards + 42 cards relating to ep25/Air + 84 cards from ep26/The End of Eva for a total of 132. Not sure if there was anything else you wanted to know?

Article: Strange EoE info cards of some kind
4:18 pm Yes, these are exactly as I imagined. I haven't seen these since at least 2005, it's been a long time. Each of these cards has information about EoE on the back of them. Bochan_bird translated some of them to include in Brendan Jamieson's FAQ as supportive evidence. Many of the cards contain information found nowhere else! Here's an example... "In the sea of LCL, Shinji wished for a world with other people. He desired to meet them again, even if it meant he would be hurt and betrayed. And just as he had hoped/wanted, Asuka was present in the new world. Only Asuka was there beside him. The girl whom he had hurt, and who had been hurt by him. But even so, she was the one he had hoped/wished for...." Sadly I don't know exactly which card states that, he wasn't very specific. But in any case, it is from that pack of cards, undoubtedly. There's many other examples in that link above. What you have there should definitely be kept, it is extremely rare. Perhaps we could get some kind of translation project going on those cards someday.
